question: What is the deductible for the PPO health insurance plan for an individual?
answer: The PPO plan has a deductible of $1,000 per individual
answer_paragraph: Health Insurance: * We offer a choice of two health insurance plans: a Preferred Provider Organization (PPO) plan and a Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) plan. * The PPO plan has a deductible of $1,000 per individual and $2,500 per family, with a coinsurance rate of 20%. * The HMO plan has a deductible of $500 per individual and $1,500 per family, with a coinsurance rate of 10%. * Our company pays 80% of the premium for the PPO plan and 90% of the premium for the HMO plan.

question: How many paid holidays does the company observe per year?
answer: Our company observes 10 paid holidays per year
answer_paragraph: Paid Time Off: * Employees accrue 10 days of paid vacation per year, with a maximum accrual of 20 days. * Employees accrue 10 days of paid sick leave per year, with a maximum accrual of 20 days. * Our company observes 10 paid holidays per year, including New Year's Day, Memorial Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Thanksgiving Day, and Christmas Day.

question: What is the benefit of the basic life insurance plan per employee?
answer: We offer a basic life insurance plan with a benefit of $50,000 per employee
answer_paragraph: Life Insurance: * We offer a basic life insurance plan with a benefit of $50,000 per employee, paid 100% by the company. * Employees may purchase additional life insurance coverage up to $200,000, with the premium paid by the employee. * Our company also offers a dependent life insurance plan with a benefit of $10,000 per dependent, paid 100% by the company.

question: How many free counseling sessions are provided by the employee assistance program per year?
answer: up to 5 free counseling sessions per year
answer_paragraph: Employee Assistance Program: * We offer an employee assistance program (EAP) with up to 5 free counseling sessions per year. * The EAP also provides resources for financial planning, legal assistance, and work-life balance. * Our company pays 100% of the cost of the EAP.

question: What is the maximum accrual of paid vacation days per year?
answer_paragraph: Paid Time Off: * Employees accrue 10 days of paid vacation per year, with a maximum accrual of 20 days. * Employees accrue 10 days of paid sick leave per year, with a maximum accrual of 20 days. * Our company observes 10 paid holidays per year, including New Year's Day, Memorial Day, Independence Day, Labor Day, Thanksgiving Day, and Christmas Day.

question: What is the coinsurance rate for the HMO health insurance plan?
answer_paragraph: Health Insurance: * We offer a choice of two health insurance plans: a Preferred Provider Organization (PPO) plan and a Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) plan. * The PPO plan has a deductible of $1,000 per individual and $2,500 per family, with a coinsurance rate of 20%. * The HMO plan has a deductible of $500 per individual and $1,500 per family, with a coinsurance rate of 10%. * Our company pays 80% of the premium for the PPO plan and 90% of the premium for the HMO plan.

question: How many hours of work must a part-time employee complete to be eligible for benefits?
answer: 1,000 hours of work in a 12-month period
answer_paragraph: Eligibility: * All full-time employees are eligible for benefits on the first day of the month following their date of hire. * Part-time employees are eligible for benefits after completing 1,000 hours of work in a 12-month period. * Eligible dependents include spouses, domestic partners, and children up to age 26.

question: What is the benefit of the dependent life insurance plan per dependent?
answer_paragraph: Life Insurance: * We offer a basic life insurance plan with a benefit of $50,000 per employee, paid 100% by the company. * Employees may purchase additional life insurance coverage up to $200,000, with the premium paid by the employee. * Our company also offers a dependent life insurance plan with a benefit of $10,000 per dependent, paid 100% by the company.

question: What is the maximum benefit of the short-term disability insurance plan per week?
answer_paragraph: Disability Insurance: * We offer a short-term disability insurance plan with a benefit of 60% of weekly earnings, up to $1,500 per week, for up to 13 weeks. * We offer a long-term disability insurance plan with a benefit of 60% of monthly earnings, up to $6,000 per month, after a 90-day waiting period. * Our company pays 100% of the premium for the short-term and long-term disability insurance plans.

question: What is the contact email for the HR department?
answer_paragraph: Contact Information: * For questions or concerns about our employee benefits, please contact our HR department at (555) 123-4567 or [hr@greentech.com](mailto:hr@greentech.com). * Our HR department is located at 123 Main Street, Anytown, USA 12345.
